source: India Ministry of Health and Family Welfare - Pregnancy Care Schedule

events.name: ANC 1 - First Antenatal Checkup
events.description: First antenatal visit. Confirm pregnancy, check weight, blood pressure, and hemoglobin.
events.why_it_matters: Early antenatal care is crucial for detecting and managing risks early.
events.what_to_expect: Doctor will confirm pregnancy, do basic tests, and give folic acid supplements.

events.name: ANC 2 - Second Antenatal Checkup
events.description: Second antenatal visit. Check fetal heartbeat and mother's health.
events.why_it_matters: Monitoring fetal development and mother's health regularly.
events.what_to_expect: Ultrasound may be done, blood tests for anemia and sugar.

events.name: ANC 3 - Third Antenatal Checkup
events.what_to_expect: Check weight, BP, fetal growth. TT vaccination may be given.

events.name: ANC 4 - Fourth Antenatal Checkup
events.description: Fourth antenatal visit. Anomaly scan usually done.
events.why_it_matters: Anomaly scan checks baby's structure and growth.
events.what_to_expect: Detailed ultrasound to check baby's organs and growth.

events.name: ANC 5 - Fifth Antenatal Checkup
events.description: Fifth antenatal visit. Monitor for gestational diabetes.
events.why_it_matters: Gestational diabetes can affect both mother and baby.
events.what_to_expect: Blood sugar test, blood pressure monitoring.

events.name: ANC 6 - Sixth Antenatal Checkup
events.description: Sixth antenatal visit. Final checkups before delivery.
events.what_to_expect: Check baby's position, plan for delivery place.

events.name: ANC 7 - Seventh Antenatal Checkup
events.why_it_matters: Ensuring mother is ready for delivery.
events.what_to_expect: Final ultrasound, blood tests, discussion on labor signs.

events.name: ANC 8 - Eighth Antenatal Checkup
events.description: Weekly visits until delivery. Checking for labor signs.
events.why_it_matters: Weekly monitoring in final month is critical.

events.name: Tetanus Toxoid (TT) - 1st dose
events.why_it_matters: Protects mother and newborn against tetanus.
events.what_to_expect: Injection in arm. Mild soreness possible.

events.name: Tetanus Toxoid (TT) - 2nd dose
events.description: Second TT vaccine, 4 weeks after first.

events.name: IFA Tablets - Iron & Folic Acid
events.description: Daily iron and folic acid supplementation throughout pregnancy.
events.why_it_matters: Prevents anemia, supports baby's growth and brain development.
events.what_to_expect: Take one tablet daily. May cause constipation - eat fiber.

events.name: Calcium Supplements
events.why_it_matters: Supports baby's bone development and prevents preeclampsia.
events.what_to_expect: Take one tablet daily with food.
